revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact image size: 128x96 px.
- Single frame only: 1 row x 1 column, no grid, no separators, no borders.
- Background must be solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space, with no gradients, no texture, and no stray pixels.
- Leave a clean magenta margin between the object and every canvas edge.

Style:
- SNES / SFC 16-bit pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur.
- Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: muted matcha and moss greens with vermilion-and-white accents.
- Consistent palette, fine readable pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source.

Subject:
- ONE Japanese thatched farmhouse, kayabuki minka, as a single coherent large field-prop object for a village map.
- Three-quarter front view, fills most of the canvas while preserving margin.
- Thick mossy thatched roof with a gentle ridge, uneven eaves, and roof overhangs.
- Dark timber frame, white plaster walls, wooden sliding door, one small round window.
- Add vegetable crates and a straw broom by the entrance, plus a soft contact shadow.
- Break the rectangular box silhouette with chimney, asymmetric trim, roof overhangs, shadows, varied roof and wall texture, subtle dirt, small readable details, and a clean readable collision footprint.
- It may later be sliced into 16x16 engine tiles, but it must read as one authored object, not repeated tile stamps.

Cleanliness:
- No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, dust specks, seam slivers, residue, or random marks.
- No cell separator lines, grid lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, or watermarks.
- No characters, creatures, birds, companions, logos, UI, modern objects, letter emblems, or symbols.
- Avoid any resemblance to Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, guns, horror mood, or dark gloomy palette.

Output should be a crisp high-resolution render of the exact 128x96 pixel-art PNG asset with solid #FF00FF background.
